Body (HTML):
Your monitor lights the screen. This lights everything else.

The ScreenGlow Series sits clean on top of your monitor and throws focused, glare-free light exactly where you need it — across your desk, your keyboard, your hands — without a single reflection bouncing back into your eyes.

Three colour temperatures. One touch.

  • Cool White (6500K) — Sharp, focused light for competitive gaming and late-night work sessions.
  • Mixed (4000K) — The balanced middle ground. Natural light that works across every context.
  • Warm White (3000K) — Easy on the eyes for long reading sessions and casual gaming.

Stepless dimming from 5–100% — not just three brightness levels, but a smooth continuous dial.
